articles.title: Apple Avoided the AI CapEx Spending Trap — Now the Bill May Be Coming Due
articles.summary: Apple's frugal AI strategy saved billions while rivals committed to a spending arms race, but new reports reveal a quiet technical crisis that may force the company into an entirely different kind of expensive bet.

articles.title: Microsoft Wants Sales Team to Push Its Own AI Models Instead of Rivals OpenAI, Google and Anthropic: Report (UPDATED)
articles.summary: Microsoft Corp. has reportedly instructed its sales team on Tuesday to position in-house AI models above rival offerings from OpenAI, Alphabet’s Google and Anthropic, as part of a fiscal 2027 strategy session. Executive Vice President Jay Parikh told staff, “Everyone...

articles.title: Markets are Missing This: Apple Stock Offers a Different Way to Bet on the Future of AI
articles.summary: The sharp rally in AI chipmakers is beginning to lose momentum. Investors are questioning whether hyperscalers can make returns that justify their massive investments, with some quietly preparing for a slowdown in the nearly $1 trillion AI spending cycle. According to UBS estimates, hyperscalers’ capex will rise 76% this year to $673 billion, but will […]

articles.title: Meta in talks to rent some of its billions in AI infrastructure to Anthropic
articles.summary: Meta is in talks with Anthropic about leasing computing capacity to the AI startup. It’s a move that could put the social media giant in competition with Amazon, Microsoft and Google in a new line of business: cloud computing.

articles.title: Nvidia Narrowly Holds Off Apple to Keep World’s Most Valuable Company Title
articles.summary: Nvidia is close to losing its place as the world’s largest company by market valuation. The stock movement Friday put the company on the brink of having a market capitalization below that of Apple The iPhone maker surpassed Nvidia in early trading, according to Dow Jones Market Data. At Friday’s close, Nvidia has a market value of $4.91 trillion, while Apple has a market cap of about $4.9 trillion, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

articles.title: SpaceX Reportedly In Talks To Supply Pentagon With AI Computing Power Worth Billions
articles.summary: The two sides are negotiating an arrangement under which SpaceX would provide computing capacity to the department at a cost of up to several billion dollars, according to a report in the Wall Street Journal.

articles.title: Did AI Just Cannibalize Microsoft’s Greatest Narrative?
articles.summary: Management has gone quiet on the cloud migration engine that built Azure, but with AI now shouldering all the growth expectations, the health of that silent giant has never mattered more.

articles.title: CrowdStrike Eyes Next Act As AI Security Business Takes Shape
articles.summary: CrowdStrike stock could gain as AI detection and response becomes the cybersecurity firm's next growth engine, beyond endpoint.

articles.title: US stocks sink this week, semiconductors walloped amid sell-off
articles.summary: US equities (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) closed Friday's session in negative territory — led by the Nasdaq Composite's 1.4% drop — all three of the market indexes seeing weekly losses amid the recent sell-off in semiconductor stocks. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre examines the day's market moves, taking a closer look at the losses in semiconductor stocks and the gains seen across the software landscape.
